title: Inventory allocation across fulfillment zones
prompt: A central depot allocates a fixed stock before uncertain regional orders arrive. Transfers are not allowed after allocation, and unmet demand is lost. Present the managerial tension between concentrating inventory and covering regions while preserving those timing and recourse limits.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize expected shortage and holding cost
model_specification.mechanism: Pre-positioned inventory determines which regional demand can be served after uncertainty resolves.

prohibited_inferences: The depot observes regional demand before allocating
